# Architecture Decision Records (ADR)

This directory stores architecture decisions for the HVAC program.

## Status
- ADR process: Active
- Platform decision: Pending final approval

## ADR Index
- ADR-0001: Platform Decision Deferred With Portable Static Baseline

## ADR Template
Use the structure below for all new ADRs:

1. Title
2. Date
3. Status
4. Context
5. Decision
6. Consequences
7. Alternatives Considered
8. Follow-up Actions
